indicators.name: Couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is large and comfortable, but it is not suitable for computer work as it is not a desk or table.

indicators.name: Cabinet
indicators.rationale: The cabinet is too small to serve as a desk or workspace.

indicators.name: Floor
indicators.rationale: The floor is made of wood, which is a common material for flooring.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a couch and a small cabinet, neither of which can serve as a suitable workspace.
